children.name: Element Inspector
children.content: function elementInspector(){function addAppStyles() {const appStyles = document.createElement("style");appStyles.textContent = `#element-inspector-panel {position: absolute;background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9);outline:4px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9);;color: #ffffff;border-radius: 4px;padding: 8px 12px;font-family: monospace;font-size: 16px;line-height: 1.5;z-index: 10000;pointer-events: none;max-width: 500px;box-shadow: 0 2px 5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);display: none;}#element-inspector-panel dl,#element-inspector-panel dd,#element-inspector-panel dt {padding:0;margin:0;}#element-inspector-panel dd {margin-bottom:0.5em;}#element-inspector-panel dt {font-weight:bold;}#element-inspector-panel dd {padding-left:1em;overflow-wrap:anywhere;}#element-inspector-highlight{position: absolute;border: 2px solid #ff6700;background-color: rgba(255, 103, 0, 0.2);pointer-events: none;z-index: 9999;display: none;}#element-inspector-panel .HTML-el {color:orange;}#element-inspector-panel .aria-attribs {color:yellow;}#element-inspector-panel .role {color:#e98cef;}#element-inspector-panel .accname {color:#FF8B5D;}#element-inspector-panel .focusable {color:white;} #element-inspector-panel .xpath {color:lime;}#inspector-notification {position: fixed;top: 10px;right: 10px;background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7);color: white;padding: 8px 12px;border-radius: 4px;font-family: sans-serif;font-size: 16px;z-index: 10001;transition: opacity 0.5s;}`;document.head.appendChild(appStyles);}addAppStyles();const createInspectorPanel = () => {const panel = document.createElement('div');panel.id = 'element-inspector-panel';panel.setAttribute('role','status');document.body.appendChild(panel);return panel;};const getAccessibleName = (element) => {try {let result = { name: '', source: '' };if (element.hasAttribute('aria-label')) {result.name = element.getAttribute('aria-label');result.source = 'aria-label';return result;}if (element.hasAttribute('aria-labelledby')) {const labelIds = element.getAttribute('aria-labelledby').split(/\s+/);const labelTexts = [];for (const labelId of labelIds) {const labelElement = document.getElementById(labelId);if (labelElement) {labelTexts.push(labelElement.textContent.trim());}}if (labelTexts.length > 0) {result.name = labelTexts.join(' ');result.source = 'aria-labelledby';return result;}}const svgElement = element.tagName.toLowerCase() === 'svg' ? element : element.closest('svg');if (svgElement) {if (element !== svgElement) {if (element.hasAttribute('aria-label')) {result.name = element.getAttribute('aria-label');result.source = 'aria-label';return result;}if (element.hasAttribute('aria-labelledby')) {const labelIds = element.getAttribute('aria-labelledby').split(/\s+/);const labelTexts = [];for (const labelId of labelIds) {const labelElement = document.getElementById(labelId);if (labelElement) {labelTexts.push(labelElement.textContent.trim());}}if (labelTexts.length > 0) {result.name = labelTexts.join(' ');result.source = 'aria-labelledby';return result;}}const titleElement = Array.from(element.children).find(child => child.tagName.toLowerCase() === 'title');if (titleElement && titleElement.textContent.trim()) {result.name = titleElement.textContent.trim();result.source = 'SVG (child)';return result;}}const title = svgElement.querySelector('title');if (title && title.textContent.trim()) {result.name = title.textContent.trim();result.source = 'SVG <title>';return result;}const desc = svgElement.querySelector('desc');if (desc && desc.textContent.trim()) {result.name = desc.textContent.trim();result.source = 'SVG <desc>';return result;}}if (element.tagName === 'IMG' && element.hasAttribute('alt')) {result.name = element.getAttribute('alt');result.source = 'alt';return result;}if (element.tagName === 'BUTTON' || element.tagName === 'A') {const svgChildren = element.querySelectorAll('svg');if (svgChildren.length > 0) {for (const svg of svgChildren) {const title = svg.querySelector('title');if (title && title.textContent.trim()) {result.name = title.textContent.trim();result.source = 'SVG <title> (child element)';return result;}if (svg.hasAttribute('aria-label')) {result.name = svg.getAttribute('aria-label');result.source = 'SVG aria-label (child element)';return result;}}}const images = element.querySelectorAll('img[alt]');if (images.length > 0) {for (const img of images) {const imgAlt = img.getAttribute('alt');if (imgAlt && imgAlt.trim() !== '') {result.name = imgAlt;result.source = 'img alt (child element)';return result;}}}if (element.textContent.trim() === '') {if (svgChildren.length > 0) {result.name = 'Unlabeled SVG';result.source = 'missing SVG label';return result;}const anyImages = element.querySelectorAll('img');if (anyImages.length > 0) {result.name = 'Unlabeled image';result.source = 'missing image alt';return result;}}const textContent = element.textContent.trim();if (textContent) {result.name = textContent;result.source = 'text content';return result;}}if (element.tagName === 'CANVAS' && element.hasAttribute('aria-label')) {result.name = element.getAttribute('aria-label');result.source = 'aria-label';return result;}if (element.tagName === 'INPUT' || element.tagName === 'TEXTAREA' || element.tagName === 'SELECT') {if (element.id) {const label = document.querySelector(`label[for="${element.id}"]`);if (label) {result.name = label.textContent;result.source = 'label element';return result;}}if (element.placeholder) {result.name = element.placeholder;result.source = 'placeholder';return result;}}if (element.title) {result.name = element.title;result.source = 'title';return result;}if (element.getAttribute('role') === 'img') {if (element.hasAttribute('aria-label')) {result.name = element.getAttribute('aria-label');result.source = 'aria-label';return result;}if (element.hasAttribute('alt')) {result.name = element.getAttribute('alt');result.source = 'alt';return result;}}if (element.tagName === 'FIGURE') {const figcaption = element.querySelector('figcaption');if (figcaption) {result.name = figcaption.textContent.trim();result.source = 'figcaption';return result;}}result.name = getFormattedTextContent(element);if (result.name) {result.source = 'text content';} else {result.name = 'No accessible name';result.source = '';}return result;} catch (error) {console.warn('Error getting accessible name:', error);return { name: 'Error retrieving name', source: '' };}};const getFormattedTextContent = (element) => {try {if (element.childNodes.length === 0 || (element.childNodes.length === 1 && element.childNodes[0].nodeType === Node.TEXT_NODE)) {return element.textContent.trim();}let result = '';let lastNodeWasText = false;for (let i = 0; i < element.childNodes.length; i++) {const node = element.childNodes[i];if (node.nodeType === Node.TEXT_NODE) {const text = node.textContent.trim();if (text) {if (lastNodeWasText && result.length > 0) {result += text;lastNodeWasText = true;}} else if (node.nodeType === Node.ELEMENT_NODE) {const style = window.getComputedStyle(node);const isBlock = style.display === 'block' || style.display === 'flex' || style.display === 'grid';const childText = getFormattedTextContent(node);if (childText) {if ((isBlock || node.tagName === 'LI') && result.length > 0) {result += ' ';}result += childText;if (isBlock && i < element.childNodes.length - 1) {result += ' ';}lastNodeWasText = true;} else {lastNodeWasText = false;}}}return result.trim().replace(/\s+/g, ' ');} catch (error) {console.warn('Error getting formatted text content:', error);return element.textContent.trim();}};const isKeyboardFocusable = (element) => {try {if (element.hasAttribute('tabindex')) {return parseInt(element.getAttribute('tabindex')) >= 0;}const focusableElements = ['A', 'BUTTON', 'INPUT', 'SELECT', 'TEXTAREA', 'DETAILS','SUMMARY', 'IFRAME', 'OBJECT', 'EMBED', 'AUDIO', 'VIDEO'];return focusableElements.includes(element.tagName) && !element.disabled && element.style.display !== 'none' && element.style.visibility !== 'hidden';} catch (error) {console.warn('Error checking focusability:', error);return false;}};function rgbToHex(rgb) {const matches = rgb.match(/\d+/g);if (!matches) return null;if (matches.length === 3) {return '#' + matches.map(num => {const hex = parseInt(num).toString(16);return hex.length === 1 ? '0' + hex : hex;}).join('');}if (matches.length === 4) {return '#' + matches.slice(0, 3).map(num => {const hex = parseInt(num).toString(16);return hex.length === 1 ? '0' + hex : hex;}).join('');}return null;}function getLuminance(color) {const rgb = /^#?([a-f\d]{2})([a-f\d]{2})([a-f\d]{2})$/i.exec(color);if (!rgb) return 0;const [r, g, b] = [parseInt(rgb[1], 16) / 255,parseInt(rgb[2], 16) / 255,parseInt(rgb[3], 16) / 255];const sRGB = [r, g, b].map(c => c <= 0.03928 ? c / 12.92 : Math.pow((c + 0.055) / 1.055, 2.4));return 0.2126 * sRGB[0] + 0.7152 * sRGB[1] + 0.0722 * sRGB[2];}function getContrastRatio(color1, color2) {const lum1 = getLuminance(color1);const lum2 = getLuminance(color2);const brightest = Math.max(lum1, lum2);const darkest = Math.min(lum1, lum2);return (brightest + 0.05) / (darkest + 0.05);}function checkColorContrast(element) {try {const computedStyle = window.getComputedStyle(element);const textColor = computedStyle.color;const backgroundColor = computedStyle.backgroundColor;const textColorHex = rgbToHex(textColor);const backgroundColorHex = rgbToHex(backgroundColor);let contrastResults = [];if (textColorHex && backgroundColorHex) {const textContrast = getContrastRatio(textColorHex, backgroundColorHex);contrastResults.push({type: 'Text Contrast',colors: `${textColor} on ${backgroundColor}`,ratio: textContrast.toFixed(2),passed: textContrast >= 4.5 ? '✅ WCAG AA' : '❌ WCAG Fail'});}const borderColor = computedStyle.borderColor;const borderColorHex = rgbToHex(borderColor);return contrastResults;} catch (error) {console.warn('Error checking color contrast:', error);return [];}}const getElementRole = (element) => {try {if (element.hasAttribute('role')) {return element.getAttribute('role');}const tagToRoleMap = {'A': (() => {const isNewWindowLink = element.hasAttribute('href') && (element.getAttribute('target') === '_blank' || element.getAttribute('target') === '_new');const baseRole = element.hasAttribute('href') ? 'link' : 'generic';return isNewWindowLink ? `${baseRole} (opens in new window)` : baseRole;})(),'ARTICLE': 'article','ASIDE': 'complementary','BUTTON': 'button','DETAILS': 'group','DIALOG': 'dialog','DIV': 'generic','FOOTER': 'contentinfo','FORM': 'form','H1': 'heading','H2': 'heading','H3': 'heading','H4': 'heading','H5': 'heading','H6': 'heading','HEADER': 'banner','IMG': element.hasAttribute('alt') && element.getAttribute('alt') === '' ? 'presentation' : 'img','INPUT': (() => {const type = element.type && element.type.toLowerCase();switch (type) {case 'button': return 'button';case 'checkbox': return 'checkbox';case 'radio': return 'radio';case 'range': return 'slider';case 'search': return 'searchbox';case 'submit': return 'button';case 'reset': return 'button';default: return 'textbox';}})(),'LI': 'listitem','MAIN': 'main','NAV': 'navigation','OL': 'list','OPTION': 'option','PROGRESS': 'progressbar','SECTION': 'region','SELECT': 'combobox','TABLE': 'table','TEXTAREA': 'textbox','UL': 'list'};return tagToRoleMap[element.tagName] || 'generic';} catch (error) {console.warn('Error getting element role:', error);return 'generic';}};const getAriaAttributes = (element) => {try {const attributes = element.attributes;const ariaAttrs = [];for (let i = 0; i < attributes.length; i++) {const attr = attributes[i];if (attr.name.startsWith('aria-')) {ariaAttrs.push(`${attr.name}="${attr.value}"`);}}return ariaAttrs;} catch (error) {console.warn('Error getting ARIA attributes:', error);return [];}};const getXPath = (element) => {try {if (!element) return '';if (element.tagName === 'HTML') return '/HTML[1]';if (element === document.body) return '/HTML[1]/BODY[1]';let ix = 0;const siblings = element.parentNode.childNodes;for (let i = 0; i < siblings.length; i++) {const sibling = siblings[i];if (sibling === element) {return getXPath(element.parentNode) + '/' + element.tagName + '[' + (ix + 1) + ']';}if (sibling.nodeType === 1 && sibling.tagName === element.tagName) {ix++;}}return '';} catch (error) {console.warn('Error getting XPath:', error);return 'Error retrieving XPath';}};const logElementDetails = (element) => {try {if (!element || !isValidElement(element)) {console.warn('No valid element selected for logging');return;}console.group('Element Details');console.log('XPATH:', getXPath(element));console.log('outerHTML:', element.outerHTML);console.groupEnd();const notification = document.createElement('div');notification.id = 'inspector-notification';notification.setAttribute('role','status');document.body.appendChild(notification);setTimeout(updateNotification,500);//update notificationfunction updateNotification(){notification.textContent = 'Element details logged to console';}setTimeout(() => {notification.style.opacity = '0';setTimeout(() => {if (notification && notification.parentNode) {notification.parentNode.removeChild(notification);}}, 500);}, 2000);} catch (error) {console.warn('Error logging element details:', error);}};let currentElement = null;let highlightElement = null;const createHighlightElement = () => {const highlight = document.createElement('div');highlight.id = 'element-inspector-highlight';document.body.appendChild(highlight);return highlight;};const updateHighlight = () => {try {if (!currentElement || !highlightElement) return;const rect = currentElement.getBoundingClientRect();highlightElement.style.left = `${window.scrollX + rect.left}px`;highlightElement.style.top = `${window.scrollY + rect.top}px`;highlightElement.style.width = `${rect.width}px`;highlightElement.style.height = `${rect.height}px`;highlightElement.style.display = 'block';} catch (error) {console.warn('Error updating highlight:', error);if (highlightElement) highlightElement.style.display = 'none';}};const isValidElement = (element) => {try {return element && element.nodeType === 1 && element.tagName && element.id !== 'element-inspector-panel' && element.id !== 'element-inspector-highlight' &&element.id !== 'inspector-notification';} catch (error) {return false;}};const updateInspectorPanel = (element) => {try {const panel = document.getElementById('element-inspector-panel');if (!panel || !element || !isValidElement(element)) return;currentElement = element;updateHighlight();const role = getElementRole(element);const accessibleNameResult = getAccessibleName(element);const accessibleName = accessibleNameResult.name;const nameSource = accessibleNameResult.source;const focusable = isKeyboardFocusable(element);const xpath = getXPath(element);const ariaAttrs = getAriaAttributes(element);let content = `<dl><dt class="HTML-el">Element:</dt> <dd class="HTML-el"><${element.tagName.toLowerCase()}></dd><dt class="role">Role:</dt> <dd class="role">${role}</dd>`;if (nameSource) {content += `<dt class="accname">Accessible Name (from ${nameSource}):</dt> <dd class="accname">${accessibleName.substring(0, 200)}${accessibleName.length > 200 ? '...' : ''}</dd>`;} else {content += `<dt class="accname">Accessible Name:</dt> <dd class="accname">${accessibleName.substring(0, 200)}${accessibleName.length > 200 ? '...' : ''}</dd>`;}content += `<dt class="focusable">Keyboard Focusable:</dt> <dd class="focusable">${focusable ? '✅ Yes' : '❌ No'}</dd>`;content += `<dt class="xpath">XPath:</dt> <dd class="xpath">${xpath}</dd>`;if (ariaAttrs.length > 0) {content += `<dt class="aria-attribs">ARIA Attributes:</dt>`;content += `<dd class="aria-attribs">`;content += `<ul style="margin: 0; padding-left: 16px;">`;ariaAttrs.forEach(attr => {content += `<li>${attr}</li>`;});content += `</ul>`;content += `</dd>`;}content += `</dl>`;panel.innerHTML = content;panel.style.display = 'block';const viewportWidth = window.innerWidth;const viewportHeight = window.innerHeight;const elementRect = element.getBoundingClientRect();const panelRect = panel.getBoundingClientRect();const actualPanelWidth = panelRect.width;const actualPanelHeight = panelRect.height;let posX, posY;if (elementRect.right + 10 + actualPanelWidth <= viewportWidth) {posX = elementRect.right + 10;} else if (elementRect.left - actualPanelWidth - 10 >= 0) {posX = elementRect.left - actualPanelWidth - 10;} else {posX = Math.max(10, viewportWidth - actualPanelWidth - 10);}if (elementRect.top + actualPanelHeight <= viewportHeight) {posY = elementRect.top;} else {posY = Math.max(10, viewportHeight - actualPanelHeight - 10);}panel.style.left = `${posX + window.scrollX}px`;panel.style.top = `${posY + window.scrollY}px`;} catch (error) {console.warn('Error updating inspector panel:', error);const panel = document.getElementById('element-inspector-panel');if (panel) {panel.innerHTML = `<div><strong>Error inspecting element</strong></div><div>There was an error inspecting this element. This may be due to browser extension conflicts.</div><div>Try navigating to a different element.</div>`;panel.style.display = 'block';}}};const safelyGetElement = (getElementFn) => {try {const element = getElementFn();return isValidElement(element) ? element : null;} catch (error) {console.warn('Error navigating to element:', error);return null;}};const handleMouseOver = (event) => {try {if (inspectorLocked ||event.target.id === 'element-inspector-panel' ||event.target.id === 'element-inspector-highlight' ||event.target.id === 'inspector-notification') {return;}updateInspectorPanel(event.target);if (keyboardMode && currentElement !== event.target) {keyboardMode = false;}} catch (error) {console.warn('Error in mouse over handler:', error);}}const handleKeyDown = (event) => {try {const key = event.key;if (key === 'q' || key === 'Q') {stopInspector();event.preventDefault();return;}if (key === 'c' || key === 'C') {if (currentElement) {logElementDetails(currentElement);event.preventDefault();}return;}if (key === 'l' || key === 'L') {toggleLockInspector();event.preventDefault();return;}if (!currentElement) {enterKeyboardMode();return;}if (!keyboardMode) {enterKeyboardMode();}let nextElement = null;switch (key) {case 'ArrowUp':nextElement = safelyGetElement(() => currentElement.parentElement);if (nextElement) {updateInspectorPanel(nextElement);event.preventDefault();}break;case 'ArrowDown':nextElement = safelyGetElement(() => currentElement.firstElementChild);if (nextElement) {updateInspectorPanel(nextElement);event.preventDefault();}break;case 'ArrowLeft':nextElement = safelyGetElement(() => currentElement.previousElementSibling);if (nextElement) {updateInspectorPanel(nextElement);event.preventDefault();}break;case 'ArrowRight':nextElement = safelyGetElement(() => currentElement.nextElementSibling);if (nextElement) {updateInspectorPanel(nextElement);event.preventDefault();}break;}} catch (error) {console.warn('Error in keyboard navigation:', error);}};const hideInspectorPanel = (event) => {try {if (inspectorLocked) {return;}if (event && event.relatedTarget && (event.relatedTarget.id === 'element-inspector-panel' ||event.relatedTarget.id === 'element-inspector-highlight')) {return;}const panel = document.getElementById('element-inspector-panel');if (panel) panel.style.display = 'none';if (highlightElement) highlightElement.style.display = 'none';if (!keyboardMode || (currentElement && event.relatedTarget !== currentElement)) {currentElement = null;}} catch (error) {console.warn('Error hiding inspector panel:', error);}};let keyboardMode = false;let inspectorLocked = false;const toggleLockInspector = () => {try {inspectorLocked = !inspectorLocked;const notification = document.createElement('div');notification.id = 'inspector-notification';notification.setAttribute('role', 'status');notification.textContent = inspectorLocked ? 'Element Inspector: LOCKED' : 'Element Inspector: UNLOCKED';document.body.appendChild(notification);setTimeout(() => {notification.style.opacity = '0';setTimeout(() => {if (notification && notification.parentNode) {notification.parentNode.removeChild(notification);}}, 500);}, 2000);console.log(`Element Inspector ${inspectorLocked ? 'locked' : 'unlocked'}.`);} catch (error) {console.warn('Error toggling inspector lock:', error);}};const enterKeyboardMode = () => {try {keyboardMode = true;if (!currentElement || !isValidElement(currentElement)) {currentElement = document.body;updateInspectorPanel(currentElement);}} catch (error) {console.warn('Error entering keyboard mode:', error);}};const stopInspector = () => {try {document.removeEventListener('mouseover', handleMouseOver);document.removeEventListener('mouseout', hideInspectorPanel);document.removeEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown);const panel = document.getElementById('element-inspector-panel');if (panel && panel.parentNode) {panel.parentNode.removeChild(panel);}if (highlightElement && highlightElement.parentNode) {highlightElement.parentNode.removeChild(highlightElement);}currentElement = null;highlightElement = null;keyboardMode = false;const notification = document.createElement('div');notification.id = 'inspector-notification';notification.textContent = 'Element Inspector turned off';notification.style.cssText = `position: fixed;top: 10px;right: 10px;background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7);color: white;padding: 8px 12px;border-radius: 4px;font-family: sans-serif;font-size: 16px;z-index: 1000000000000;transition: opacity 0.5s;`;document.body.appendChild(notification);setTimeout(() => {notification.style.opacity = '0';setTimeout(() => {if (notification && notification.parentNode) {notification.parentNode.removeChild(notification);}}, 500);}, 3000);console.log('Element Inspector stopped permanently.');} catch (error) {console.error('Error stopping inspector:', error);const elements = ['element-inspector-panel', 'element-inspector-highlight', 'inspector-notification'];elements.forEach(id => {const el = document.getElementById(id);if (el && el.parentNode) {el.parentNode.removeChild(el);}});}};const initElementInspector = () => {try {if (document.querySelector('#element-inspector-panel')) {document.querySelector('#element-inspector-panel').remove();}if (document.querySelector('#element-inspector-highlight')) {document.querySelector('#element-inspector-highlight').remove();}const panel = createInspectorPanel();highlightElement = createHighlightElement();document.addEventListener('mouseover', handleMouseOver);document.addEventListener('mouseout', hideInspectorPanel);document.addEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown);console.log('Element Inspector initialized. Hover over elements to see details. Use arrow keys to navigate the DOM. Press "L" to lock/unlock the inspector. Press "C" to log element details to console. Press "Q" to stop.');} catch (error) {console.error('Error initializing element inspector:', error);alert('Failed to initialize Element Inspector. Check the console for details.');}};initElementInspector();}elementInspector();
children.description: Hover over any element and get a super simple summary of its tagname, role, accessible name and XPATH.

children.name: Outliner
children.content:
function outlineEls() {function addAppStyles(color) {const outlinerStyles = document.createElement('style');outlinerStyles.setAttribute('id', 'outlinerStyles');outlinerStyles.textContent = `.a11y-tools-outliner {box-shadow: 0px 0px 0px 10px white;outline: 3px solid ${color};outline-offset: -2px;position: relative;}.a11y-tools-tag-label {position: absolute;top: 0;right: 0;background: ${color};color: white;font-family: Arial, sans-serif;font-size: 12px;padding: 2px 4px;z-index: 9999;pointer-events: none;}`;document.head.appendChild(outlinerStyles);}let matchedEls = 0;let el = prompt('What HTML element? [Tip: any valid CSS selector will work]');let color = prompt('What color? [color name or hex value works]

TIP: you can undo the outline afterwards by pressing 'q' without having to reload page', 'red');var elementsToOutline = document.querySelectorAll(el);console.clear();addAppStyles(color);Array.from(elementsToOutline).forEach(elementToOutline => {console.log('Outlined:');console.log(elementToOutline);elementToOutline.classList.add('a11y-tools-outliner');const tagLabel = document.createElement('div');tagLabel.className = 'a11y-tools-tag-label';tagLabel.textContent = elementToOutline.tagName.toLowerCase();elementToOutline.appendChild(tagLabel);matchedEls++;});if (matchedEls === 0) {alert('No elements found that match the selector ' + el);} else {alert(matchedEls + ' elements found that match the selector ' + el + '. See log for more details.');}function removeOutlines() {const allOutlinedEls = document.querySelectorAll('.a11y-tools-outliner');Array.from(allOutlinedEls).forEach((el) => {el.classList.remove('a11y-tools-outliner');const existingLabel = el.querySelector('.a11y-tools-tag-label');if (existingLabel) {existingLabel.remove();}});const outlinerStyles = document.querySelector('#outlinerStyles');outlinerStyles.remove();}function checkKeyPresses() {const keydownHandler = function (e) {if (e.key === 'q') {e.preventDefault();removeOutlines();document.removeEventListener('keydown', keydownHandler);}};document.addEventListener('keydown', keydownHandler);}checkKeyPresses();}outlineEls();
children.description: Apply an outline to any collection of elements using a CSS selector.

children.name: Structure Revealer
children.content:
(function () {'use strict';const TOOL_ID = 'structure-revealer-host';const existingHost = document.getElementById(TOOL_ID);if (existingHost) {existingHost._cleanup();existingHost.remove();return;}const PALETTE = {header:   { highlight: '#FF6B35', labelBg: '#B94B00', labelFg: '#ffffff' },main:     { highlight: '#4ECDC4', labelBg: '#006E68', labelFg: '#ffffff' },footer:   { highlight: '#FFE66D', labelBg: '#7A6C00', labelFg: '#ffffff' },aside:    { highlight: '#C77DFF', labelBg: '#5C00A3', labelFg: '#ffffff' },nav:      { highlight: '#74D7CB', labelBg: '#007A73', labelFg: '#ffffff' },section:  { highlight: '#F4A261', labelBg: '#7A3B00', labelFg: '#ffffff' },table:    { highlight: '#FF9F1C', labelBg: '#8B5000', labelFg: '#ffffff' },list:     { highlight: '#A8DADC', labelBg: '#005F7A', labelFg: '#ffffff' },tabs:     { highlight: '#E63946', labelBg: '#9B1C23', labelFg: '#ffffff' },h1:       { highlight: '#FF4D6D', labelBg: '#8B0020', labelFg: '#ffffff' },h2:       { highlight: '#FF8500', labelBg: '#7A3D00', labelFg: '#ffffff' },h3:       { highlight: '#FFD166', labelBg: '#6B4E00', labelFg: '#ffffff' },h4:       { highlight: '#06D6A0', labelBg: '#005C40', labelFg: '#ffffff' },h5:       { highlight: '#118AB2', labelBg: '#003F5C', labelFg: '#ffffff' },h6:       { highlight: '#9B5DE5', labelBg: '#3D0070', labelFg: '#ffffff' },};const ELEMENT_CONFIG = {header: {selector:   'header, [role="banner"]',displayTag: el => el.tagName === 'HEADER' ? '<header>' : `<${el.tagName.toLowerCase()}>[banner]`,},main: {selector:   'main, [role="main"]',displayTag: el => el.tagName === 'MAIN' ? children.description: Highlight structural elements on a page, including custom elements of your choosing.
